title: Abstract Class Names Should Comply with a Naming Convention
description: This rule checks if all abstract class names match a provided regular expression. If a non-abstract class matches the regular expression, an issue is raised to suggest making it abstract or renaming it. Sharing naming conventions is crucial for efficient team collaboration. The default regular expression for this rule is ^Abstract[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$.
recommendation: Ensure all abstract class names match the provided regular expression. If a non-abstract class name matches, consider making it abstract or renaming it.
impact: Improves code readability and consistency, and facilitates efficient collaboration within the team.

checks.message: Abstract class names should match the pattern ^Abstract[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$.
Non-abstract classes should not have names that match the abstract class naming convention.
